invalid_review_attempts_not_counted.reason: Initial claude-opus-4-8 max read-only run produced no completed review output and was terminated; it is not counted as the valid pack review.
Second run attempted a Read tool and ended before final JSON due to max-turns; it is not counted as the valid pack review.

findings.title: Closeout pack scaffold absent from reviewed diff
findings.details: Claude could not verify the untracked CP00-003 scaffold from the diff-only prompt. The scaffold is finalized in this pack evidence and then validated by closeout-pack and RP00 validators before commit.

findings.title: working_product_behavior_ref labels the metadata prechecker
findings.details: Claude noted that working_product_behavior_ref points at the metadata prechecker. It also confirmed the receipt is bounded by allow_metadata_only, false runtime/write permission flags, no_real_data, and no product-state writes.

adjudication_notes: One completed claude-opus-4-8 max read-only/no-tools review is recorded for CP00-003.
P2 CP00-003-C1 is handled by finalizing the previously untracked pack scaffold and requiring closeout-pack plus RP00 validators before commit.

P2 CP00-003-C2 is adjudicated as non-blocking because the referenced field remains a metadata-only behavior reference with all runtime permission, audit write, storage, and product-state write flags false.
No unresolved P0, P1, or P2 findings remain after adjudication.
